nodes.name: Geokichla
nodes.summary: Geokichla（Geokichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如Pied thrush、Spotted ground thrush、Black-eared ground thrush等21种鸟类。

nodes.name: Seram thrush
nodes.summary: The Seram thrush (Geokichla joiceyi) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to montane rainforest on Seram in Indonesia. Traditionally, it has been considered a subspecies of the Buru thrush, in which case the common name of the 'combined species' was Moluccan thrush. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Seram thrush (Geokichla joiceyi) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to montane rainforest on Seram in Indonesia.
